descriptionText: Princess Y78 For Sale 2022| Guest Cabins:4| Crew Cabin:4 PRICE: 3,680,000 US$If you are considering a well‑kept 80‑foot class yacht in Asia, this Princess Y78 For Sale 2022 offers a practical and attractive option. Delivered in 2022 and currently located in Hong Kong, she has been maintained in good condition and reflects the modern design direction of the Princess Y‑Class range. The Princess Y78 For Sale 2022 model is known for combining a functional layout with a contemporary interior, and this particular yacht follows that approach closely.Below is a concise summary of her main specifications:• Brand: Princess • Year: 2022 • Length: 24.6 m • Max Beam: 5.7 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 1.6 m • Yacht Location: Hong Kong • Max Speed: 36 knots • Fuel Tank: 6,000 l • Water Tank: 1,150 l • Guest Cabins: 4 • Crew Cabins: 4 • Engines: 2 x MAN V12 1800 HPThe exterior styling carries the clean lines and large glazing that characterise recent Princess designs. The extended window profile along the saloon allows natural light to enter throughout the main deck, contributing to an open and comfortable atmosphere. A distinctive feature of the Y78 is the full‑height window on the port side, positioned beside the dining area. On board, this makes the dining space feel connected to the sea while remaining well sheltered and practical for regular use.Her deck arrangements are designed to be flexible, providing several outdoor areas for different activities. The foredeck includes a walkthrough design with U‑shaped seating and a sunbathing space, making it suitable for relaxed cruising or spending time at anchor. The flybridge offers a generous footprint, with the option for loose furniture aft or the installation of a crane and tender, depending on an owner’s preferences. This adaptability is one of the strengths of the Y78 layout, as it allows the yacht to be used for short day trips or longer coastal cruising.Accommodation on board is arranged for both comfort and privacy. The yacht provides four guest cabins, all located on the lower deck. Three of these are en suite and positioned forward, giving guests convenient access and separation from the main social areas. The owner’s stateroom sits amidships and is accessed via a dedicated staircase and private lobby, a design that enhances the sense of space and personal retreat. Crew are also well provided for, with four crew berths and supporting facilities, which helps ensure smooth operation during extended cruising.Performance is delivered by twin MAN V12 1800 HP engines, giving the yacht a maximum speed of around 36 knots. This performance capability allows the yacht to cover distances efficiently while still offering the stability and handling expected from a vessel in this size range. Fuel and water capacities support longer trips, making the yacht suitable for exploring varied destinations around the region.Overall, this Princess Y78 For Sale 2022 presents a balanced combination of design, functionality and condition, making her a solid candidate for anyone seeking a modern 24‑metre yacht in the region.
descriptionHtml:
Princess Y78 For Sale 2022| Guest Cabins:4| Crew Cabin:4
PRICE: 3,680,000 US$

If you are considering a well‑kept 80‑foot class yacht in Asia, this Princess Y78 For Sale 2022 offers a practical and attractive option. Delivered in 2022 and currently located in Hong Kong, she has been maintained in good condition and reflects the modern design direction of the Princess Y‑Class range. The Princess Y78 For Sale 2022 model is known for combining a functional layout with a contemporary interior, and this particular yacht follows that approach closely.

Below is a concise summary of her main specifications:

• Brand: Princess
• Year: 2022
• Length: 24.6 m
• Max Beam: 5.7 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 1.6 m
• Yacht Location: Hong Kong
• Max Speed: 36 knots
• Fuel Tank: 6,000 l
• Water Tank: 1,150 l
• Guest Cabins: 4
• Crew Cabins: 4
• Engines: 2 x MAN V12 1800 HP

The exterior styling carries the clean lines and large glazing that characterise recent Princess designs. The extended window profile along the saloon allows natural light to enter throughout the main deck, contributing to an open and comfortable atmosphere. A distinctive feature of the Y78 is the full‑height window on the port side, positioned beside the dining area. On board, this makes the dining space feel connected to the sea while remaining well sheltered and practical for regular use.

Her deck arrangements are designed to be flexible, providing several outdoor areas for different activities. The foredeck includes a walkthrough design with U‑shaped seating and a sunbathing space, making it suitable for relaxed cruising or spending time at anchor. The flybridge offers a generous footprint, with the option for loose furniture aft or the installation of a crane and tender, depending on an owner’s preferences. This adaptability is one of the strengths of the Y78 layout, as it allows the yacht to be used for short day trips or longer coastal cruising.

Accommodation on board is arranged for both comfort and privacy. The yacht provides four guest cabins, all located on the lower deck. Three of these are en suite and positioned forward, giving guests convenient access and separation from the main social areas. The owner’s stateroom sits amidships and is accessed via a dedicated staircase and private lobby, a design that enhances the sense of space and personal retreat. Crew are also well provided for, with four crew berths and supporting facilities, which helps ensure smooth operation during extended cruising.

Performance is delivered by twin MAN V12 1800 HP engines, giving the yacht a maximum speed of around 36 knots. This performance capability allows the yacht to cover distances efficiently while still offering the stability and handling expected from a vessel in this size range. Fuel and water capacities support longer trips, making the yacht suitable for exploring varied destinations around the region.

Overall, this Princess Y78 For Sale 2022 presents a balanced combination of design, functionality and condition, making her a solid candidate for anyone seeking a modern 24‑metre yacht in the region.
